title: cirsium × rollowii
intro: Cirsium × rollowii, also known as Rattlesnake weed or Rattlesnake master, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to North America. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to inhibit the growth of cancer cells and its anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cirsium × rollowii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Cirsium × rollowii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions with medications.
